title: tolerance_budget
description: Phase 2 contract. The promotion-threshold knobs the correction miner uses. The bound on `current_promotion_buffer` is enforced here at write time so a malformed budget file fails closed before the miner makes a promotion decision.

min_promotion_buffer.description: Bound: the buffer must never drop below 2 F1 points beyond the variance budget. Fixed at the schema layer so an edit to widen the bound is auditable as a schema change, not a config tweak.

max_promotion_buffer.description: Bound: the buffer must never exceed 10 F1 points. Fixed at the schema layer.

current_promotion_buffer.description: Active buffer added on top of the variance budget. Must satisfy min_promotion_buffer <= current_promotion_buffer <= max_promotion_buffer.

global_median_budget.description: Fallback variance budget when fewer than 3 non-legacy runs have been observed for a source.

per_source_budgets.description: Per-source variance budgets. May be an empty object on first boot; the calibration-mode gate handles the empty case.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the budget entry was last refreshed.
